pages.raw_text:
The danger of outside electric
wires, to which the National Board
Of Underwriters called attention to
in their report on Spokane, was ex-
emplified Saturday when a mile and
third of death dealing wire be-
longing to the Washington Water
Power company fell on East
Sprague avenue. The wire was
heavily charged and lay on the
thoroughfare menace to passing
humans and animals Saturday and
all day Sunday.


1t was a feed wire for the trolley
line and was down from the trestle
to Nampa street. Residents in the
vicinity wondered where the COM
petent linemen were that the COM
pany officials say have been Sc
cured in the place Of the strikers.


An effort will be made to COM
pei the Washington Water Power
company to bury the voltage wires
from the Occur d'Alenes that run
along Lincoln street and Third ave-
